allow: Bash(python -c "from backend.agents.scoring_agent import run_scoring_agent; print\(''scoring_agent OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "from backend.api.routes import router; print\(''routes OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "from backend.agents.answer_draft_agent import run_answer_draft_agent; print\(''answer_draft_agent OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "from backend.main import app; print\(''main app OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "from backend.agents.pdf_parser_agent import run_pdf_parser; print\(''import OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "from backend.api.routes import router; print\(''routes OK''\); [print\('' '', r.path\) for r in router.routes]")
Bash(python -c "from backend.main import app; print\(''app OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m, p\) for p,ops in d[''''paths''''].items\(\) for m in ops]")
Bash(git -c core.fileMode=false add CLAUDE.md .gitignore backend/ skills/ frontend/ requirements.txt docker-compose.yml)
Bash(python -c "from backend.api.routes import router; paths = [r.path for r in router.routes]; print\(''\\n''.join\([p for p in paths if ''knowledge'' in p or ''chat'' in p]\)\)")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet | Format-Table")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python* | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Start-Process python -ArgumentList ''-m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'' -WorkingDirectory ''C:\\Project\\CDP-AI-Platform'' -WindowStyle Hidden")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 6; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod ''http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health'' -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host ''OK'' } catch { Write-Host ''FAIL'' }")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod ''http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health'' -TimeoutSec 6; Write-Host ''Status:'' $r.status; Write-Host ''Model:'' $r.claude_api.model } catch { Write-Host ''ERROR:'' $_ }")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 8; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Port:'' \($conn -ne $null\); Invoke-RestMethod ''http://localhost:8000/api/v1/crawl/presets''")

Bash(powershell -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName ''CDP AI Platform 8000'' -Direction Inbound -Action Allow -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 8000 -Profile Any -Description ''CDP AI Platform FastAPI Server''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetFirewallRule | Where-Object {$_LocalPort -eq ''8000'' -or $_DisplayName -like ''*8000*''} | Select-Object DisplayName, Enabled, Direction, Action")
Bash(powershell -Command "netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name=''''CDP AI Platform 8000''''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_IPAddress -notlike ''127.*''} | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 1960 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 8000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TcpTestSucceeded")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''.claude/settings.local.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); hooks=d[''hooks'']; print\(''PostToolUse entries:'', len\(hooks[''PostToolUse'']\)\); print\(''Stop entries:'', len\(hooks[''Stop'']\)\); [print\(''PT hook:'', h[''hooks''][0][''command''][:60]\) for h in hooks[''PostToolUse'']]; print\(''Stop cmd:'', hooks[''Stop''][0][''hooks''][0][''command''][:60]\)")

Bash(python -c "import socket; print\(''''hostname:'''', socket.gethostname\(\)\); print\(''''IPs:''''\); import subprocess; result = subprocess.run\([''''ipconfig''''], capture_output=True, text=True, encoding=''''cp949''''\); print\(result.stdout\)")
Bash(cmd /c "schtasks /query /tn ""CDP*"" /fo LIST 2>&1 || schtasks /query /fo LIST | findstr /i CDP 2>&1")
Bash(python -c "from backend.main import app; print\(''import OK''\)")
Bash(cmd /c "schtasks /query /fo LIST /v 2>&1 | findstr /i /c:""CDP"" /c:""watchdog"" /c:""Task Name"" /c:""Status"" /c:""Last Run"" /c:""Next Run"" /c:""Logon"" /c:""Run As""")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ""name=''python.exe'' or name=''pythonw.exe''"" get ProcessId,CommandLine /format:csv 2>&1")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :8000 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -ano ^| findstr :8000 ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")

Bash(python -c "from backend.api.routes import router; routes = [\(r.path, list\(r.methods\)\) for r in router.routes if hasattr\(r,'methods'\)]; [print\(p,m\) for p,m in routes if 'knowledge' in p]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p,list\(d['paths'][p].keys\(\)\)\) for p in d.get\('paths',{}\) if 'knowledge' in p]")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where \\"name like '%python%'\\" get ProcessId,CommandLine 2>&1")

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('$FILE', encoding='utf-8').read()); print('Syntax OK: $FILE')" 2>&1 || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qi 'routes\.py' && powershell.exe -NonInteractive -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "Start-Sleep 2; Stop-Process -Name python,pythonw -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Start-Process pythonw.exe -ArgumentList 'C:\\Project\\CDP-AI-Platform\\server_watchdog.py' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Project\\CDP-AI-Platform' -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Host 'CDP server restarted'" && echo 'routes.py changed: server restarting...' || true
hooks.statusMessage: routes.py 변경 감지 — 서버 재시작 중...

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "[CHECK] CLAUDE.md / docs/*.md 업데이트 필요 여부 확인 — 새 기능 또는 아키텍처 결정사항이 있으면 문서를 갱신하세요."}'
